params.name: Wild Pansy's Juice
params.description:
On Feb 15, 506 BC, Fairy King Oberon created the Pansy Juice.
The Wild Pansy's Juice is a treasure of the Fairy King Oberon that has the power to make people fall in love with the first person they see upon waking. When Oberon quarreled with the goblin queen Titania, he dripped the juice in her eye, causing her to become infatuated with a donkey-headed man. After a series of comedic events, Oberon ended the curse and Titania, thoroughly ashamed, reunited with her husband.
